research.query: Uponor Eastern Europe Europe HVAC pump distributor manufacturer
research.summary: Uponor Oyj is a Finnish company specializing in plumbing, radiant heating/cooling, and indoor climate solutions for residential and commercial buildings. Listed on Helsinki Stock Exchange. Products sold in 100+ countries, prominent in Nordic and Eastern European markets. Also operates infrastructure pipe systems (water/wastewater). Recently acquired by Georg Fischer for €2.2bn.

outreach_notes: 该公司为Tier2潜力客户。Uponor 主营管道系统而非泵体，但其地暖/供水系统可能需要循环泵配套。建议通过其采购或产品团队切入，推荐 Farreach 的 OEM 配套方案。注意 Uponor 已被 Georg Fischer 收购，需关注供应链变化。
